tool_input.content:
import json
import shutil
from collections import Counter
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path

base = Path('memory/long_term')
backup_root = Path('memory/cleanup_backups')
stamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
backup_dir = backup_root / f'long_term_tool_log_purge_{stamp}'
backup_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

removed = []
removed_reason = Counter()
kept = 0

for path in sorted(base.glob('memory_item_*.json')):
    try:
        data = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    except Exception:
        shutil.copy2(path, backup_dir / path.name)
        path.unlink()
        removed.append(str(path))
        removed_reason['invalid_json'] += 1
        continue

    title = str(data.get('title') or '')
    content = str(data.get('content') or '')
    metadata = data.get('metadata') if isinstance(data.get('metadata'), dict) else {}

    is_tool_execution_log = title.startswith('工具执行成功:') or title.startswith('工具执行失败:')
    is_auto_history_noise = title.startswith('工具') and ('STDOUT:' in content or 'Traceback' in content or '[SEARCH]' in content or '--- 文件:' in content)
    is_tool_source = str(metadata.get('source') or '').lower() in {'test', 'memory', 'default'} and is_tool_execution_log

    if is_tool_execution_log or is_auto_history_noise or is_tool_source:
        shutil.copy2(path, backup_dir / path.name)
        path.unlink()
        removed.append(str(path))
        removed_reason['automatic_tool_execution_memory'] += 1
    else:
        kept += 1

# Remove non-canonical temporary index files if any were recreated.
for path in sorted(base.glob('index.*.tmp')):
    shutil.copy2(path, backup_dir / path.name)
    path.unlink()
    removed.append(str(path))
    removed_reason['temporary_index_file'] += 1

print('backup', backup_dir)
print('removed_total', len(removed))
print('kept_memory_items', kept)
print('removed_reason', dict(removed_reason))
print('sample_removed')
for item in removed[:20]:
    print(item)
